title: mastixia pentandra subsp. cambodiana
intro: Mastixia pentandra subsp. cambodiana, also known as Cambodian Mastixia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to Cambodia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Mastixia pentandra subsp. cambodiana include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing protection against oxidative stress and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
